markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To demonstrate and configure the process of publishing content from AirOps to Webflow CMS collections for Good Call.](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AirOps can directly publish content to Webflow CMS collections, mapping grid columns to Webflow fields](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Multiple Webflow collections exist for different content clusters, but consolidating into a single CMS collection with subfolder slugs could simplify management](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [The process involves converting Markdown to HTML, mapping fields, and handling image URLs properly](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Updating existing content is possible, but creating new pages with existing slugs will result in errors](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)

## Topics

### AirOps to Webflow Publishing Configuration

  - [New column added in AirOps: "Export to CMS to Webflow"](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Webflow authentication set up for Good Call account](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Status set to "queued" for staging in Webflow before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
  - [Fields mapped between AirOps grid columns and Webflow CMS fields](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Demonstration using "Appointment Scheduling Software" collection](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

### Content Preparation and Field Mapping

  - [Markdown content converted to HTML using "Convert Markdown to HTML" workflow](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Image URLs need to be accessible; AirTable image URLs worked in this case](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [Slug field manually entered, following the pattern "/appointment-scheduling-software/\[article-name\]"](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)
  - [Most fields (title, description, meta title, etc.) mapped directly from existing columns](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)

### Multiple Collections and Management

  - [Currently using separate Webflow collections for different content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Suggestion to consolidate into a single "programmatic SEO" collection for easier management](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Proposed URL structure: goodcall.com/p/\[content-type\]/\[article-slug\]](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Separate tabs in AirOps for different page types, each with its own publish column](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

### Content Updates and Slug Handling

  - [Updating existing content works by running the publish action on the same row](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1359.0)
  - [Attempting to create a new page with an existing slug results in an error](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [System prevents accidental overwriting of existing pages with different content](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Create separate tabs in AirOps for each content type/collection](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Set up publish columns for each tab, mapping to respective Webflow collections](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)
  - [Consider consolidating Webflow collections into a single CMS for easier long-term management](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Test the publishing process with actual content for each collection](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=1417.0)
  - [Ensure proper handling of image URLs when moving from AirTable to AirOps to Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/LyU6UrzbXMCBfd_yP1-nXkit1g6eaUhX?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
